docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA CUELLAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ENDURE PAINTING, REPRESENTED BY NATHANIEL LIMA IS PRESENT. HEARING COMMENCES AT 8:40 A.M. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT AT THAT TIME. DEFENDANT APPEARS IN COURT AT 8:45 AM. COURT RECESS AT 8:45 TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO BE SWORN IN AND TO ALLOW FOR DISCOVERY EXAMINATION OF DOCUMENTS BETWEEN PARTIES. COURT RESUMES AT 9:05 AM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED FEB-08-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ENDURE PAINTING
DECLARATION RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUELLAR, PATRICIA
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NATHANIEL D. LIMA, OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT ENDURE PAINTING
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,947.34 FILED BY CUELLAR, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT ENDURE PAINTING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUELLAR, PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENDURE PAINTING $278.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $353.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
